title: Hidyk's Realm + avpbr
description: Add Hidyk's Realm/fresh textures + avpbr compatibility
body:
This resoursepack add **[Hidyk's Realm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hidyksrealm)/[Fresh textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-textures) + [AVPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/avpbr-retextured)** compatibility by adding textures that conflict with avpr as a separate resousepack. The resource pack must be selected higher than avpbr and Hidyk's Realm/fresh textures.

### Right resursepack order:

![right resursepack order (fresh textures)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1444354d1d6cb0c6350f229558328f17515a35be.png)
![right resursepack order (hidyk's realm)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac56d02d75bc7f84f587c824ce735f7d1d0322b.png)
